title: Remote Control Car - 1:18 High Speed Off-Road RC Car, 2.4 GHz 4WD Fast All Terrain RC Drift Vehicle Buggy Monster Truck 4X4 Toy, Gift for Boys
features: High-Speed Remote Control Car: The upgraded electric motor provides strong power for the high-speed car, reaching a top speed of 40 km/h. The excellent acceleration and precise speed control of this off-road vehicle offer kids an exceptional racing experience. Children will love this rc car

4WD All-Terrain Car Toy: The remote-controlled car features a high-quality nylon chassis and an independent suspension system, equipped with four independently suspended wheels. The high-traction rubber tires provide better stability on uneven terrains, and the waterproof and splash-proof ESC allows the high-speed car to drive faster and more stably across various terrains. Note: The car should not be submerged in water or driven into heavily muddy areas

2.4GHz Remote-Controlled: The fast car comes with a remote control that is easy to use and highly responsive, making it suitable for beginners. The control range is up to 80 m (260 ft), and the remote can adjust speed and steering angle as needed. The remote requires 4 pcs of 1.5V AA batteries (not included). Note: before starting the game, ensure to turn on the car switch (press and hold for 2 seconds) and the remote control switch to pair them; the car switch is located inside the car (red switch)

2 Rechargeable Batteries: The drifting car is equipped with 2 pcs of 7.4V 1200mAh rechargeable lithium-ion batteries. Each battery allows for a runtime of 35 minutes, providing a total runtime of 70 minutes. The batteries take about 4 hours to fully charge. USB charging cable is included, allowing you to power the remote control car anytime, anywhere

Ideal Car Toy Gift: The exquisite packaging makes this car an ideal toy gift for children. The high-speed car toy features lights and a sleek design, making it look very cool while driving, perfect for racing and off-road experiences. The high-speed car is suitable for children aged 8 and above and is also great for adults who love high-speed vehicles
description: Product Description 1:18 scale high-speed car is designed specifically for speed enthusiasts and is equipped with a powerful RC380 motor, reaching speeds of up to 40 kilometers per hour. It excels in straight-line racing, allowing children to experience speed and excitement during competitions, providing a thrilling gaming experience. The remote control car features four-wheel drive and an independent suspension system. With a high-quality nylon chassis, waterproof and splash-proof ESC, and high-traction all-terrain tires, it can handle various types of terrains, such as sand, grass, and wilderness. This enables children to drive the high-speed car freely in different environments, giving them more joyful experiences. Note: The rc car should not be submerged in water or driven into heavily muddy areas. Note: Before starting the game, press and hold the remote control car's switch for 2 seconds. The switch button is located under the car shell, behind the left wheel. Press the switch button on the remote control to begin the game. The switch design is located inside to protect against splashes. Powerful Brush Motor The high-speed vehicle is equipped with a 380 brush motor. This motor is characterised by good heat dissipation, low noise and a robust structure. The motor offers strong performance, low power loss and minimal heat impact on peripheral components. It delivers high speeds, enabling the vehicle to accelerate quickly to 40 km/h. Waterproof and Splash-Proof ESC The high-speed car's ESC is made with waterproof materials and a sealed structure, effectively preventing moisture from entering and allowing the high-speed car to tackle various terrains with ease. The new circuit design, along with high-capacity electronic components, enables the ESC to withstand continuous high-intensity output, providing unlimited power to the high-speed car. Non-Slip All-Terrain Tyres The non-slip off-road tyres are made of heat-resistant rubber and have good heat resistance. The surface of the tyres is designed with a special tread pattern that provides excellent traction and slip resistance. At the same time, the material has good abrasion resistance, which gives the tyres a longer service life. Strong Shock Absorber System Independent suspension system with adjustable shock absorbers to increase or decrease suspension tension according to the requirements of high speeds. Effortlessly absorbs small bumps, prevents bottoming out on large jumps, provides excellent handling and a smooth ride for high-speed vehicles, and ensures stability and control performance during high-speed driving.
